personal.name: Swabhiman Thapa
personal.title: Mechanical Engineer
personal.subtitle: HVAC Specialist · AutoCAD · SolidWorks
personal.about: I am a Mechanical Engineer at Tribhuvan University, with major HVAC systems, Refrigeration and Building Services. I combine strong technical knowledge with internship experience to deliver real-world engineering solutions.

responsibilities: Surface Development using Plate and Sheet
Maintenance techniques for hydraulic turbines including Francis and Pelton wheel types
Introduction to hydropower components: intake gates, bellmouth transitions, concrete formwork structures, and penstock pipe systems

projects.title: Design and fabrication of pesticide spraying drone (Final year project)
Optimization of Oxygen Concentrator (Hami Teen Bhai)
projects.description: Conceptual design and performance optimization of an oxygen concentrator, focusing on efficiency improvements in flow regulation and molecular sieve performance.
